parameters-en.LowCutEnable: Turns the Low Cut filter on and off.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Adjusts the frequency of the Low Cut filter. May be useful in removing undesirable low end rumble.
parameters-en.Low Cut Slope: Adjusts the slope of the Low Cut filter. Higher values apply a steeper slope.
parameters-en.LowShelfEnable: Turns the Low Shelf band on and off.
parameters-en.Low Shelf Freq: Adjusts the frequency of the Low Shelf band.
parameters-en.Low Shelf Gain: Adjusts the gain of the Low Shelf band.
parameters-en.LowEnable: Turns the Low band on and off.
parameters-en.Low Freq: Adjusts the frequency of the Low Band
parameters-en.Low Q: Adjusts the bandwidth of the Low band. Lower values apply a wider boost or cut for shaping overall frequency response; higher values apply a precise, surgical boost or cut for accentuating a specific frequency, removing troublesome resonances, or even controlling feedback.
parameters-en.Low Gain: Adjusts the gain of the Low band.
parameters-en.MidEnable: Turns the Mid band on and off.
parameters-en.Mid Freq: Adjusts the frequency for the Mid band.
parameters-en.Mid Q: Adjusts the bandwidth of the Mid band. Lower values apply a wider boost or cut for shaping overall frequency response; higher values apply a precise, surgical boost or cut for accentuating a specific frequency, removing troublesome resonances, or even controlling feedback.
parameters-en.Mid Gain: Adjusts the gain of the Mid band.
parameters-en.HighEnable: Turns the high band on and off.
parameters-en.High Freq: Adjusts the frequency for the High band.
parameters-en.High Q: Adjusts the bandwidth of the High band. Lower values apply a wider boost or cut for shaping overall frequency response; higher values apply a precise, surgical boost or cut for accentuating a specific frequency, removing troublesome resonances, or even controlling feedback.
parameters-en.High Gain: Adjusts the gain of the High band.
parameters-en.HighShelfEnable: Turns the High Shelf band on and off.
parameters-en.High Shelf Freq: Adjusts the frequency of the High Shelf band.
parameters-en.High Shelf Gain: Adjusts the gain of the High Shelf band.
parameters-en.HighCutEnable: Turns the High Cut filter on and off.
parameters-en.High Cut: Adjusts the frequency of the High Cut filter.
parameters-en.High Cut Slope: Controls the slope of the High Cut filter. Higher values apply a steeper slope.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall output level of the EQ block.
